description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof, clean geometric lines, and a minimalist aesthetic. The structure features a combination of white and wood-paneled exterior walls, with large windows and sliding glass doors that open onto a spacious patio. The property includes a private swimming pool with an organic, freeform shape, surrounded by a tiled deck and several lounge chairs. A driveway leads to a covered carport or garage area, and the lot is landscaped with several medium-sized trees and shrubs. The outdoor living space is expansive, with areas for seating and relaxation, and the overall layout emphasizes open, functional spaces. The bungalow appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back from the main footprint, creating a tiered effect.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with white and wood-paneled walls, large windows, a pool, and a spacious patio surrounded by trees. The design is minimalist and open, with a driveway and covered carport.
description_view_0: From this view, the pool, patio, and rear landscaping are prominent, with the driveway and carport visible on the left.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the front entrance, carport, and the main patio area with lounge chairs and pool in the background.
description_view_2: The side view shows the pool, patio, and a clear view of the upper story setback, with landscaping along the perimeter.
description_view_3: This perspective emphasizes the driveway, carport, and the open patio area, with the upper story and trees in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
